messages.saveLink: Save this link to access your booking later:
messages.contactSoon: We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your booking.
messages.finalPriceNote: Final price will be confirmed after review

loading.title: Loading your booking
loading.message: Please wait while we retrieve your details...

errors.sessionExpired: We couldn't retrieve your booking details. This might be because your session expired.
errors.checkEmail: Please check your email for your booking confirmation or contact support if you need assistance.
errors.cancelledNote: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact support.

paid.emailConfirmation: You will receive a confirmation email with all the details of your booking.
paid.arriveEarly: Please arrive at the pick-up location 15 minutes before the scheduled departure time.
paid.referenceReady: Have your booking reference (#{ref}) ready to present upon arrival.

pending.reviewRequest: Our team will review your request and confirm availability within 24 hours.
pending.bankingDetails: We will provide you with our banking details so you can proceed with the payment.
pending.contactReference: Have your booking reference (#{ref}) ready when contacting us.

statusInstructions.other: Please contact support for more information about your booking status.

statusMessages.paid: Your booking has been confirmed and paid.
statusMessages.pending: Thank you for your booking request! Our team will review it and contact you shortly with confirmation and payment details.
